lessons.what: Pushed code directly to production without sandbox
lessons.lesson: ALWAYS work in sandbox first, never push to production without user approval
EVERY task gets its own Telegram topic, no exceptions
Always take screenshots with Puppeteer and send to topic before asking for approval

lessons.what: Orchestrator coded instead of delegating to koder
lessons.lesson: Orchestrator must DELEGATE to agents, never code directly

lessons.what: isBall variable undefined in modal tabs
lessons.lesson: Always check variable scope when using variables in array definitions
Specific routes must come BEFORE parameterized routes in Express

lessons.what: trust proxy not set for rate limiter
lessons.lesson: Behind nginx, always set app.set('trust proxy', 1) for express-rate-limit

lessons.what: Koder deployed dashboard changes directly without waiting for user approval
lessons.lesson: Even for non-production services like the dashboard, WAIT for user approval before deploying. The flow is: screenshots → user reviews → user approves → deploy.

lessons.what: commenceTime saved as string not Date object
lessons.lesson: Always use new Date() when saving dates to MongoDB, not toString(). Mongoose won't auto-convert strings to Date type.
Never use hard limit() on queries that may return more results. Use pagination or remove limit for admin/internal queries.

lessons.what: rate limit exceeded from 300ms delay between API calls
lessons.lesson: When calling external APIs in loops, use at least 500ms delay. For bulk operations, use 1000ms+ or batch endpoints.

lessons.what: stale events not marked completed after date passed
lessons.lesson: Add a cleanup job or query filter: if event.commenceTime < now and status is not completed, auto-mark or filter out.

sidebar count + no-cache
סינון U19/Femenil
ZozoBet headers good except missing CSP and server version exposed. SSL valid 87 days. Backend on localhost only. Rate limiter active at 200/window.
header blue
bet365 redesign
Task 'תיקון ליין רץ — זמנים + משחקים גמורים' passed all gates
Updated admin.html reset UI: tooltip, next-Tuesday display, confirm dialogs with 30-day message
Changed DELETE /users/:id/bets and POST /periods/reset to only delete bets older than 30 days. Added Tuesday auto-reset cron in index.js and GET /api/admin/next-reset endpoint.
Period reset API correctly deletes bets older than 30 days and preserves recent ones. deletedOldBets count in response is accurate.
Added socket.io WebSocket + 4 new API endpoints to dashboard server.js. Key: use http.createServer + Server(io) pattern, keep SSE for backward compat
Matrix rain canvas + CSS animations + glassmorphism work well together. Key: preserve all API fetch logic, only change presentation layer.
Generated 9 cyberpunk assets with Nano Banana Pro. API key found in openclaw.json skills.entries, not auto-injected to env - need to export manually. Sequential generation works reliably.

browser-eval.js default tests: when run without test file, uses built-in sanity checks (.c-match, .bal, body, noErrors). Selectors: .oc->.c-odds, .match-row->.c-match, .event-row->.c-match, .totals-line/.total-row->.b365-row
Command failed 3 times. Log: /tmp/heal-20260218-060328.log
Retry wrapper with alert+logging on exhaustion. Added to SYSTEM.md tools section.
Created branch-task.sh and merge-task.sh scripts. Integrated into pipeline.sh init→branch, done→merge. Key: always use --no-ff for merge history, abort on conflicts.
Semantic TF-IDF search with severity weighting finds relevant lessons even without exact keyword match. Handle messy data formats with normalize functions.
Keep delegation scripts simple - JSON queue in /tmp with send.sh notification works well
Script takes TASK_ID BRANCH_NAME SUMMARY, gets diff, screenshots, sends to General with approve/reject buttons
Use chattr -i before restore and +i after to handle immutable production files. Always mongodump for DB backup.
Must filter template literals (${...}) from grep results — they are JS expressions not valid CSS selectors

lessons.lesson: Pipeline: branch→code→test→screenshot→merge. Errors: none

lessons.what: Koder reported 'fixed' 3 times while bug was still visible in screenshots
lessons.lesson: Must LOOK at screenshots before reporting done. Compare BEFORE vs AFTER. If they look the same — not fixed.

lessons.what: Orchestrator waits for Yossi to ask 'what happened' instead of proactively updating
lessons.lesson: After spawning an agent: set a reminder/check after 3-5 min and proactively report to General. NEVER wait for user to ask for status.

lessons.what: Period filtering failed - relied only on matchPeriod
lessons.lesson: Use multiple fallbacks: matchPeriod + matchMinute + scores estimation

lessons.what: Koder succeeds with exact code snippets
lessons.lesson: Always provide complete code in task prompt, not vague instructions
Frontend must estimate quarter from total score when period field is empty
409 odds_changed/odds_stale pattern prevents arbitrage between bet365 and ZozoBet
Frontend POST /watch + backend in-memory TTL + aggregator 10s sync for watched events only

lessons.what: koder worked directly on production instead of sandbox
lessons.lesson: NEVER work on production files directly. Always sandbox first, then copy to production only with user approval. The koder-fix-islive task modified production files — this violates the iron rule.
Clear clocks object on visibilitychange to force re-sync from server data
test from Or

lessons.what: messages.html only worked with API key, not owner cookie auth
lessons.lesson: Always test new pages as logged-in owner (cookie), not just bot API key. Add user flow E2E tests, not just HTTP 200.
Deep repo analysis needs to check actual file content not just names. Gap analysis with severity scoring makes recommendations much more useful than generic tag matching.
When using --read-only with tmpfs, need uid/gid flags matching container user, and can't mount tmpfs inside a read-only bind mount

fs module must be required before use - encryption utils placement matters. OpenRouter is a great addition for BYOK since it gives access to 100+ models via one key. AES-256-CBC with random IV per enc

mobile.js auto-injects hamburger menu on all pages with .header-inner class. mobile.css handles responsive breakpoints. Key: 16px font-size on inputs prevents iOS zoom. All 23 HTML pages need viewport
This is a test to verify lesson saving works
All 16 tests pass. Agent added .env file loading and restored EXTERNAL_API_TOKEN to fix external API tests. Code is legitimate — no hardcoded fakes, no test modifications.
Registration flow works: register→magic_token_in_DB→magic_link_redirect→dashboard_with_cookie. No magic_url returned in API response (by design - sent via email). Frontend handles both cases.
.env and .jwt_secret committed to git with all secrets exposed. Always check git ls-files for sensitive files. Also default admin password still active.
